blog_title: Kolkata – Meghalaya Luxury Honeymoon Tour Package – Top 5 Questions Tourists Tend to Ask
seo_title: Kolkata – Meghalaya Luxury Honeymoon Tour Package – Top 5 Questions Tourists Tend to Ask
description: Discover the ultimate travel packing list for every adventure. Pack smart, light, and stress-free with essential tips .
body_content:
Published by travelxploria on Wed Jun 18 2025

Meghalaya, one of the seven sister states of India, makes for an ideal luxury honeymoon destination with its breathtaking landscapes and serene ambiance. However, when it comes to finalizing a tour package, tourists often have several questions.

​Travelers’ Top 5 Questions about Kolkata-Meghalaya Luxury Honeymoon Package

Here are the top 5 questions that tourists tend to ask about the Meghalaya Luxury Honeymoon Package.

​What are the Inclusions in a Luxury Meghalaya Honeymoon Tour Package?

A luxury honeymoon tour package in Meghalaya typically includes accommodation in premium hotels or resorts, meals, transportation (both to and from the destination and within the region), guided tours, and entry fees to various attractions.

Some packages may also offer special romantic experiences such as candlelit dinners in scenic locations, spa treatments; private boat rides on the serene Umngot River, etc. You can expect visits to scenic spots; enjoy local festivals, nature walks through lush green forests, and much more.
​

What kind of romantic attractions can be expected on this tour package?

Shillong in Meghalaya offers a rich array of attractions, including Cherrapunji, Gari Hills, Mawsynram, Double Decker Living Root, Jaintia Hills, Nongkhnum Island, and Kyllang Rock.
The region also hosts several vibrant festivals such as Shad Suk Mynsiem, Beh Dein Khlam, Nongkrem Dance Festival, Shad Sukra, Lahoo Dance, Bacardi NH7 Weekender, Wangala Festival, Strawberry Festival, Doregata Dance, Autumn Festival, and Ranikor Festival.

When is the Best Time to Visit Meghalaya?

The best time to visit Meghalaya is from October to June, with temperatures rarely exceeding 30°C. March to June offers a perfect summer escape, while autumn (October to November) and winter (December to February) are popular among tourists from warmer regions.
The seasonal temperatures of this place range from 39°F to 91°F (4°C to 33°C), with varying rainfall levels throughout the year. Meghalaya is very wet and regarded as the wettest region in the country. It is suggested that you avoid visiting the place during peak monsoons. The monsoon season starts in May and ends in September or sometimes mid-October. The state gets around 250 cm of rainfall on average.

What Kind of Accommodations can be expected?

A luxury honeymoon package in Meghalaya typically includes stays in top-notch hotels and resorts that offer all the comforts and amenities you would expect. These accommodations often feature spacious rooms, comfortable beds, and stunning views of the natural surroundings.
Some packages of honeymoon tour of Meghalaya from Kolkata may also include stays in boutique resorts or eco-friendly cottages for a unique experience.

How to Reach Meghalaya?

Shillong, Meghalaya, is easily accessible by air, rail, and road. The Shillong Airport at Umroi, 35 km away, connects to Kolkata, while the Guwahati International Airport, 130 km away, offers more options.

Guwahati Railway Station is the closest railhead, 135 km away, with taxis and buses available for onward travel.

Assam State Transport Corporation (ASTC) and Meghalaya Transport Corporation (MTC) buses operate between Guwahati and Shillong, with various options to suit different budgets. Alternatively, driving from Guwahati to Shillong via NH 40 takes 3 to 4 hours.

With its stunning landscapes, pleasant climate, and top-notch accommodations, Meghalaya promises to make your honeymoon a trip of a lifetime. So choose your package, pack your bags, and get going!
